metadata.description: Gemstone material properties for crafting system - stat bonuses applied to sockets, enchantments, jewelry
metadata.usage: Material properties define stat bonuses based on item type. itemTypeTraits apply bonuses to socket, enchantment, and jewelry.
notes: Gemstone materials focus on magical bonuses and stat increases
Runtime: Pick material by rarityWeight → Apply shared + itemTypeTraits[itemType] → Calculate final stats
